code: kucoin_build_request(   base_url,   endpoint,   method = "GET",   query = list(),   body = NULL,   keys = NULL,   sign = NULL,   parse_envelope = parse_kucoin_response,   .perform = httr2::req_perform,   .parser = identity,   is_async = FALSE,   timeout = 10,   .get_timestamp_ms = NULL )

title: Build and Execute a KuCoin API Request — kucoin_build_request
text: base_url Character; API base URL. endpoint Character; API path. method Character; HTTP method. Default "GET". query Named list; query parameters. Default list(). body Named list NULL; request body. Default NULL. keys List NULL; API credentials. Default NULL. sign Function NULL; function(req, keys, ctx) returning signed request, ctx carries method, path, body, get_timestamp_ms. Default sign_request() (adapted signature). parse_envelope Function; function(resp) turning response data raising KuCoin API error. Default parse_kucoin_response(). .perform Function; httr2 perform function. Default httr2::req_perform. .parser Function; post-processing function applied parsed $data. Default identity. is_async Logical; whether .perform returns promises. Default FALSE. timeout Numeric; request timeout seconds. Default 10. .get_timestamp_ms Function NULL; zero-argument function returning epoch milliseconds HMAC signing. NULL (default), uses local UTC clock. Pass custom function (e.g. one fetches KuCoin server time) avoid clock-drift issues.

title: Build and Execute a KuCoin API Request — kucoin_build_request

title: Build and Execute a KuCoin API Request — kucoin_build_request

title: kucoin 4.1.0
text: Migrated transport layer onto connectcore, shared connector base. KucoinBase now inherits connectcore::RestClient instead carrying copy credential-storage / sync-async / server-time / active-binding plumbing. KuCoin plugs base two documented seams — .sign() (header-based HMAC scheme: KC-API-KEY / KC-API-SIGN / KC-API-TIMESTAMP / KC-API-PASSPHRASE / KC-API-KEY-VERSION, signing timestamp + method + URL-encoded path + raw body) .parse_envelope() (KuCoin’s code / data envelope). public API unchanged: every Kucoin* class, method, exported kucoin_build_request() / kucoin_paginate() helpers keep exact signatures behaviour. generic transport helpers now come connectcore instead duplicated . package-private then_or_now() fetch_server_time_ms(), plus generic JSON→data.table toolkit (to_snake_case(), as_dt_row(), as_dt_list()), imported connectcore (KuCoin copies byte--byte equivalents). KuCoin-specific parsers (parse_orderbook(), parse_klines(), flatten_pages(), futures kline parser) helpers whose precise behaviour test-suite pins (ms_to_datetime() / ns_to_datetime() shape contracts, coerce_cols() dedup, ;-collapse warning id) stay package. KuCoin keeps request funnel. Unlike venues, KuCoin signs exact compact JSON request body must transmit byte sequence wire, kucoin_build_request() continues send body via req_body_raw() (signed string verbatim) rather connectcore’s default funnel, pretty-prints body invalidate signature. kucoin_build_request() / kucoin_paginate() gained optional sign / parse_envelope parameters (defaulting KuCoin’s ) seams drive funnel; existing callers unaffected.

title: kucoin 4.1.0
text: Added connectcore Imports (pinned dereckscompany/connectcore@v0.0.1 via Remotes renv.lock).

title: kucoin 4.0.3
text: KucoinFuturesTrading$set_dcp() / $get_dcp() migrated KuCoin’s new unified DCP endpoint. legacy futures-specific paths (POST /api/v1/orders/dead-cancel-GET /api/v1/orders/dead-cancel-/query api-futures.kucoin.com) retired KuCoin around 2026-05 — docs page withdrawn, GET path returned HTTP 404 POST returned 403 even accounts relevant permission. KuCoin replaced unified Universal-Trading-Account endpoint spot host: POST /api/ua/v1/dcp/set GET /api/ua/v1/dcp/query, taking tradeType parameter accepts SPOT, MARGIN, FUTURES. now hardcode tradeType = "FUTURES" override base URL spot host inside methods, public method API stays unchanged — existing futures_trading$set_dcp(timeout, symbol) $get_dcp(symbol) calls keep working. Spot DCP (KucoinTrading$set_dcp() / $get_dcp()) untouched — still works /api/v1/hf/orders/dead-cancel-* paths spot host.

title: kucoin 4.0.3
text: KucoinBase$.request() (private) gains optional base_url parameter overrides instance’s configured host single call. Used migrated futures DCP methods can target spot host every KucoinFuturesTrading method keeps using futures host. behaviour change existing call site — base_url = NULL (default) preserves previous behaviour exactly.

title: kucoin 4.0.3
text: Live integration coverage Futures REST surface. New [LIVE] test blocks tests/testthat/test-live-integration-public.R (7 tests KucoinFuturesMarketData public endpoints) test-live-integration-private.R (13 tests covering authenticated KucoinFuturesAccount, KucoinFuturesMarketData$get_full_orderbook, read-KucoinFuturesTrading queries, migrated DCP methods). Pins 5 path-corrected GET endpoints v4.0.2 (get_margin_mode, get_cross_margin_leverage, get_max_open_size, get_max_withdraw_margin, get_full_orderbook) plus migrated DCP endpoints next time KuCoin moves futures endpoint, CI surfaces 404 instead waiting user report. DCP set_dcp test deliberately uses timeout = -1 (disable) real side effects. Write methods (set_margin_mode, set_cross_margin_leverage, add_isolated_margin, remove_isolated_margin) intentionally exercised — require real positions / funds. Authenticated futures tests wrap call tryCatch() skip clear reason KuCoin returns -futures-account / -permission error, suite stays usable contributors without funded futures sub-account. Endpoints genuinely 404 still fail loudly (regression want catch).

title: kucoin 4.0.2
text: 144 Verified: YYYY-MM-DD markers R6 roxygen blocks bumped 2026-05-23. Every marker walked individually live KuCoin docs — endpoint paths, HTTP methods, “page exists” confirmed per endpoint, sampled. 119 matched source -; 25 surfaced docs URL / endpoint-path drift documented . Refreshed 25 stale ### Official Documentation URLs KuCoin reorganised docs-new site. 17 returned HTTP 404 futures section moved (e.g. /futures-trading/account/get-account-overview → /account-info/account-funding/get-account-futures; /futures-trading/orders/cancel-order--orderid → /futures-trading/orders/cancel-order--orderld — note typo KuCoin’s side); 7 pointed pages now document different REST endpoint source code calls; 1 (KucoinMarketData$get_symbol) pointed -symbols list page instead single-symbol detail page. replacement URLs verified HTTP GET. futures Dead Connection Protection (DCP) docs withdrawn KuCoin entirely, KucoinFuturesTrading$set_dcp() / $get_dcp() now reference equivalent spot-trading DCP page inline note (see BUG FIXES related endpoint observation).

title: kucoin 4.0.2
text: KucoinFuturesAccount$get_margin_mode(): GET /api/v1/marginMode → GET /api/v2/position/getMarginMode. KucoinFuturesAccount$set_margin_mode(): POST /api/v1/marginMode → POST /api/v2/position/changeMarginMode. KucoinFuturesAccount$get_cross_margin_leverage(): GET /api/v1/crossMarginLeverage → GET /api/v2/getCrossUserLeverage. KucoinFuturesAccount$set_cross_margin_leverage(): POST /api/v1/crossMarginLeverage → POST /api/v2/changeCrossUserLeverage. KucoinFuturesAccount$get_max_open_size(): GET /api/v1/maxOpenSize → GET /api/v2/getMaxOpenSize. KucoinFuturesAccount$get_max_withdraw_margin(): GET /api/v1/maxWithdrawMargin → GET /api/v1/margin/maxWithdrawMargin. KucoinFuturesAccount$add_isolated_margin(): POST /api/v1/marginDepositIn → POST /api/v1/position/margin/deposit-margin. KucoinFuturesAccount$remove_isolated_margin(): POST /api/v1/marginWithdrawOut → POST /api/v1/margin/withdrawMargin. KucoinFuturesMarketData$get_full_orderbook(): GET /api/v2/level2/snapshot → GET /api/v1/level2/snapshot. Futures DCP appears removed KuCoin without announcement. KucoinFuturesTrading$set_dcp() (POST /api/v1/orders/dead-cancel-) still accepted Futures REST API (returns HTTP 403 accounts without relevant permission, route alive), $get_dcp() (GET /api/v1/orders/dead-cancel-/query) now consistently returns HTTP 404 dedicated docs pages withdrawn. Methods left place flagged roxygen; callers relying futures DCP treat $get_dcp() broken KuCoin clarifies.

title: kucoin 4.0.1
text: ms_to_datetime() / ns_to_datetime() longer emit spurious "NAs introduced coercion" warnings given -NA_character_ vector. NA → NA path documented contract, problem worth warning. Implemented type-dispatching input feeding non-NA entries .numeric() — suppressWarnings(), hide genuine bad input (e.g. malformed numeric string future API change). Pinned counter-regression test asserts ms_to_datetime("--number") still warns loudly. coerce_cols(dt, cols, fn) deduplicates cols. Previously passing column name twice — coerce_cols(dt, c("time", "time"), ms_to_datetime) — feed already-coerced POSIXct value back ms_to_datetime, reinterpreting epoch-seconds epoch-ms silently producing wildly wrong values (year 56,000+). Now uses (col unique(cols)). fix applied binance alpaca helpers.

title: kucoin 4.0.0
text: Margin Trading — KucoinMarginTrading class (9 endpoints): intent-based wrappers (open_short, close_short, open_long, close_long), borrow, repay, borrow/repay/interest history, borrow rate, leverage modification. Margin Market Data — KucoinMarginData class (5 endpoints): cross-margin symbols, isolated-margin symbols, margin config, collateral ratios, risk limits. Lending — KucoinLending class (7 endpoints): loan market data, market interest rates, purchase (lend), modify purchase, purchase/redeem orders, redeem. KucoinFuturesMarketData (13 endpoints): contract details, tickers, orderbooks, trade history, klines, mark prices, funding rates, funding history, server time, service status. KucoinFuturesTrading (17 endpoints): place/cancel/query futures orders (single, batch, test), stop orders, fills, open order value, Dead Connection Protection (DCP). KucoinFuturesAccount (14 endpoints): account overview, positions, position history, margin mode, cross margin leverage, max open size, add/remove isolated margin, risk limits, funding history. get_futures_base_url(): New helper Futures API base URL (https://api-futures.kucoin.com), configurable via KUCOIN_FUTURES_API_ENDPOINT env var. Futures-specific parsers: parse_futures_orderbook() parse_futures_klines() handle different data formats (numeric values vs strings, nanosecond timestamps, OHLC column order). Margin order validation: validate_margin_order_params() helper margin-specific order parameter checking auto-generated clientOid.

title: kucoin 4.0.0
text: Version bump 3.0.0 → 4.0.0. datetime_created → created_at (classes) datetime_created → created_time (KucoinMarginTrading) datetime_created → c_time (KucoinMarketData$get_announcements()) datetime_updated → last_updated_at (KucoinTrading) datetime_order → order_time (KucoinOcoOrders) datetime_match → match_time (KucoinTrading$add_order_sync()) datetime_applied → apply_time (KucoinLending) datetime → time (ticker, trade history, orderbook, 24hr stats) Kline parameter renamed: freq → timeframe kucoin_backfill_klines() related functions. KucoinMarketData$get_klines() default window changed: = NULL/= NULL method now returns recent candles requested timeframe rather previous “last 24 hours” window. Pass explicit /restore deterministic ranges. KucoinDeposit$get_deposit_addresses(): currency now required argument (removed NULL default) match KuCoin API requirement.

title: kucoin 4.0.0
text: Fixed KucoinMarginData$get_cross_margin_symbols() parser handle KuCoin’s new {timestamp, items} response envelope. Previously returned garbled columns (v1, v2, …) instead proper data. Fixed KucoinLending$get_loan_market() — KuCoin now requires authentication /api/v3/project/list. Removed erroneous auth = FALSE. Removed usage %||% operator defined imported; replaced explicit (.null(...)) checks. Fixed URLencode() request signing coerce query values character encoding, preventing errors numeric parameters. KucoinMarginTrading$repay() now coerces response timestamp POSIXct instead leaving raw millisecond numeric, matching rest package’s timestamp behaviour. KucoinMarginData$get_margin_config() now returns schema-stable zero-row data.table currencyList empty data NULL, rather indexing empty row. Orderbook parsers gain level depth column. parse_orderbook() (spot) parse_futures_orderbook() (futures) now emit 1-indexed position column per side -wire “best price first” ordering survives later sort filter (level == 1 best bid / best ask). Affects KucoinMarketData$get_part_orderbook(), KucoinMarketData$get_full_orderbook(), KucoinFuturesMarketData$get_part_orderbook(), KucoinFuturesMarketData$get_full_orderbook(). Cancel-parser NULL / empty-cancelledOrderIds guards every cancel method returns cancelled_order_id long-format rows. Previously NULL response empty cancelledOrderIds array trigger row-replication errors; parsers now short-circuit zero-row data.table documented schema. Affects KucoinOcoOrders (3 methods), KucoinFuturesTrading (3 methods). KucoinSubAccount account_type semantic labels. get_detail_balance() get_all_spot_balances() previously emitted raw response field names (main_accounts, trade_accounts, margin_accounts); now stable semantic labels "main", "trade", "margin" documented filter idiom balances[account_type == "trade"] keeps working. ms_to_datetime() / ns_to_datetime() (alpaca equivalent rfc3339_to_datetime) longer short-circuit (.na(x)) input. short-circuit returned length-1 NA_POSIXct_ data.table::set() recycle existing column’s storage type rather replacing column POSIXct — -NA timestamp columns silently typed character/numeric instead POSIXct. helpers now always produce length-matching POSIXct vector, even every input value missing.

title: kucoin 4.0.0
text: One-entity-per-row, -list-column convention across every R6 class. Sweeping pass 16 classes eliminate data.table list columns standardise one five shape treatments (;-collapse arrays plain strings; long-format explode arrays objects, 1-indexed position column order matters; wide-prefix flatten fixed-schema nested objects; sibling-method re-route collections don’t fit row entity; JSON-string encode dynamic-key array--array objects). Matches convention sibling alpaca binance packages — see new vignette("data-shapes"). KucoinTrading$cancel_all_by_symbol(): character, now data.table result column. KucoinMarketData$get_market_list(): character vector, now data.table market column. KucoinMarginData$get_margin_config(): raw list, now long-format data.table one row per supported currency, plus max_leverage, warning_debt_ratio, liq_debt_ratio. KucoinMarginData$get_collateral_ratio(): raw list, now flattened data.table currency, lower_limit, upper_limit, collateral_ratio columns. KucoinMarketData$get_announcements(): ann_type now ;-collapsed character column (Treatment ) instead either list column long-format row explosion. Recover strsplit(x, ";", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]. shared collapse_string_array_fields() helper emits -per-session warning value ever contains literal ; silent corruption unmissable. collapse_string_array_fields(x, fields) — NA-safe Treatment ;-collapse. coerce_cols(dt, cols, fn) — applies coercion function set columns reference, silently skipping columns aren’t table. Replaces repeated (nrow(dt) > 0 && "X" %% names(dt)) { dt[, X := fn(X)] } boilerplate across every parser. Increased default request timeout 10s 30s. @import data.table added centrally via R/imports.R simplify namespace management. Support KC-API-KEY KUCOIN_API_KEY environment variable naming conventions.

title: kucoin 4.0.0
text: KucoinTrading$get_open_orders(): symbol required (optional). KucoinDeposit$get_deposit_addresses(): currency required (optional). KucoinLending$get_purchase_orders() / get_redeem_orders(): status required query list. KucoinLending$get_loan_market(): now documented authenticated. Corrected wrap_list_fields / as_dt_row documentation accurately describe length >= 1 wrapping behavior. Expanded @return blocks across KucoinMarginData, KucoinMarginTrading, KucoinLending: every public method now spells columns R types, per-method row entity, empty case shaped — matching binance/alpaca data-shape vignette. Updated kucoin_btc_usdt_4h_ohlcv dataset documentation reflect 18,351 rows March 2026. Three new vignettes: “Margin Trading”, “Futures Trading”, “Data shapes one-row-per-entity convention”. README gains Design Philosophy section explaining snake_case / timestamp / shape-normalisation contract pointing vignette("data-shapes") full catalogue. Mirrors section sibling alpaca / binance READMEs already carry. Updated ROADMAP v4.0.0 Futures classes added completed items.

title: kucoin 4.0.0
text: test-live-integration-public.R: 21 tests covering public endpoints (auth required). test-live-integration-private.R: 35 tests covering authenticated read-endpoints plus add_order_test dry-run. New mocked test suites: test-KucoinMarginTrading.R, test-KucoinMarginData.R, test-KucoinLending.R, test-KucoinFuturesMarketData.R, test-KucoinFuturesTrading.R, test-KucoinFuturesAccount.R, test-bug-hunt.R, test-fetch-.R. live tests use Sys.sleep(0.5) rate limiting calls. Write tests use /orders/test dry-run endpoint — real orders placed. Added data-shape regression tests KucoinMarginData, KucoinMarginTrading, KucoinLending: public method asserts list columns, column types match documented @return block, empty-response path yields zero-row data.table rather stub row.

title: kucoin 4.0.0
text: Refreshed bundled kucoin_btc_usdt_4h_ohlcv dataset (18,351 rows, Oct 2017 – Mar 2026).

title: kucoin 4.0.0
text: scripts/LINT.sh — new script runs air format . first (reformatted code gets linted, passing run leaves working tree clean) lintr::lint_package() package loaded via devtools::load_all() object_usage_linter honours utils::globalVariables() declarations data.table NSE columns. Matches binance package’s lint script air format step folded . .lintr config repaired. previous file started leading # .lintr comment made DCF parser reject (Malformed config file) — lintr::lint_package() failing silently. Now adopts binance ruleset: line length 120, indentation 2, explicit return() style, object_name_linter allowing snake_case / SNAKE_CASE / CamelCase / camelCase R6 class names KuCoin’s camelCase API params (clientOid, orderId) accepted.

title: kucoin 4.0.0
text: Explicit return() everywhere. Every closure now explicit return(...) instead relying R’s implicit-last-expression. Touches 78 sites across package (9 R/, 69 across tests/ vignettes/). Side-effect-closures get return(invisible(NULL)). var <- (...) style. Three sites refactored declare variable default value conditionally reassign instead (POSIXct-vs-epoch-ms coercion KucoinFuturesMarketData$get_klines(); ticker mock alternation vignettes/async-usage.Rmd). Function-call named args (f(x = (...) else b)) scope rule left alone. tests/testthat/helper-constants.R — shared test-setup file (auto-sourced testthat tests). Defines BASE_SPOT / BASE_FUTURES, TEST_KEYS, TEST_SYMBOL_SPOT / TEST_SYMBOL_FUTURES, one new_xxx() constructor helper per R6 class. Strips ~130 lines duplicated setup boilerplate 14 test files; collapses 22 inline KucoinMarketData$new(...) calls test-KucoinMarketData.R new_market(). Resolves three name collisions per-file scoping hiding (new_account, new_market, new_trading now explicit new_futures_* siblings).

title: kucoin 4.0.0
text: LICENSE consolidated single full MIT file. package previously shipped 2-line DCF stub (LICENSE) full MIT text (LICENSE.md), satisfy CRAN License: MIT + file LICENSE template alongside GitHub’s licensee detector. two requirements conflict practice. DESCRIPTION now declares License: MIT (non-CRAN form), R CMD check skips DCF parse LICENSE file GitHub still detects MIT. previously bundled Citation Clause dropped — package now plain MIT, matching sibling alpaca binance packages. LICENSE.md removed; LICENSE carries full text.

title: kucoin 3.0.0
text: Complete rewrite package architecture. implementation functions now wrapped R6 classes inheriting KucoinBase. Removed v2 standalone functions (kucoin_get_ticker(), kucoin_place_order(), etc.). Use corresponding R6 class methods instead. API credentials now managed via environment variables (KC-API-KEY, KC-API-SECRET, KC-API-PASSPHRASE) passed directly class constructors get_api_keys().

title: kucoin 3.0.0
text: KucoinMarketData (16 endpoints): announcements, currencies, symbols, tickers, orderbooks, trade history, 24hr stats, klines, market list, server time, service status, fiat prices. KucoinTrading (21 endpoints): place/cancel/query HF spot orders (single, batch, test), sync variants, modify order, fills, open/closed order lists, Dead Connection Protection (DCP). KucoinStopOrders (7 endpoints): place/cancel/query stop orders trigger price support. KucoinOcoOrders (8 endpoints): place/cancel/query OCO (One-Cancels-) orders. KucoinAccount (11 endpoints): account summary, API key info, spot/margin account balances, ledger history, HF ledger, base actual fee rates. KucoinDeposit (3 endpoints): create deposit addresses, query addresses deposit history. KucoinWithdrawal (5 endpoints): create/cancel withdrawals, query quotas, history, details. KucoinTransfer (2 endpoints): universal internal transfers, transferable balance queries. KucoinSubAccount (4 endpoints): create sub-accounts, list summaries, query balances. KucoinBase: abstract base class shared auth, request, pagination, timestamp logic. Sync order endpoints: add_order_sync(), add_order_batch_sync(), cancel_order_by_id_sync(), cancel_order_by_client_oid_sync() — place cancel orders receive fill results single round trip. Order modification: modify_order() — amend price size existing HF order place. Dead Connection Protection (DCP): set_dcp() / get_dcp() — dead-man’s switch auto-cancels orders bot stops heartbeating. Fee rate queries: get_base_fee_rate() (account tier default) get_fee_rate() (per-symbol actual rates VIP/KCS discounts). HF trading ledger: get_hf_ledger() — fills, fees, settlements HF orders (7-day rolling window lastId-based pagination). Server time: get_server_time() — fetch exchange clock drift detection. Service status: get_service_status() — pre-flight check exchange operational state. Fiat prices: get_fiat_prices() — real-time fiat currency prices crypto assets. Configurable timestamp source: time_source parameter R6 class constructors. Set "server" use KuCoin server time HMAC signing instead local clock, avoiding clock-drift issues machines inaccurate system time. Async support: R6 classes support async = TRUE mode returning promises non-blocking /O via httr2::req_perform_promise(). kucoin_backfill_klines(): Bulk historical kline download resume support, automatic time-range segmentation, CSV output. Bundled dataset: kucoin_btc_usdt_4h_ohlcv — 20,000+ rows real BTC-USDT 4-hour OHLCV data examples testing. Automatic pagination: kucoin_paginate() handles multi-page API responses transparently. Timestamp handling: time_convert_from_kucoin() time_convert_to_kucoin() millisecond/nanosecond epoch conversion.

title: kucoin 3.0.0
text: API responses returned data.table objects snake_case column names. Datetime columns automatically converted POSIXct. Input validation order placement (type, side, symbol format, parameter combinations). Request signing uses HMAC-SHA256 base64 encoding per KuCoin v2 API spec. Shared mock infrastructure (tests/testthat/mockery.R + mock_router.R) tests, README, vignettes. get_* queries, add_* creation, cancel_* cancellation, modify_* amendments, set_* configuration. _by_id / _by_client_oid suffixes, _sync / _batch modifiers, snake_case throughout. Renamed: add_subaccount -> add_sub_account, get_list_summary -> get_sub_account_list, get_spot_v2 -> get_all_spot_balances. Renamed KucoinStopOrders KucoinOcoOrders: cancel_by_id -> cancel_order_by_id, cancel_by_client_oid -> cancel_order_by_client_oid, cancel_batch -> cancel_all, get_by_id -> get_order_by_id, get_by_client_oid -> get_order_by_client_oid, get_detail_by_id -> get_order_detail_by_id. Renamed: get_subaccount -> get_sub_account.

title: kucoin 3.0.0
text: Full roxygen2 R6 method documentation public methods. Class-level docs include endpoint tables, example usage, curl equivalents. Two vignettes: “Getting Started” (9 classes, synchronous) “Async Usage” (promise-based patterns). README evaluated code examples using invisible mocked HTTP. pkgdown site https://dereckscompany.github.io/kucoin/.

title: kucoin 3.0.0
text: MIT licence additional citation clause requiring attribution academic publications, research outputs, publicly distributed derivative works.
